## Why It Works

This template captures attention by validating the reader's own frustrations with a widespread issue. It then provides an actionable roadmap to success with three simple key elements. Framing a trait as a "massive differentiator" uses strong, enticing language that appeals to people who want to get ahead.

## Template

In the last few years, [Industry or Aspect] around the [World/Country/Etc] has disintegrated.
You will thrive if you have a [Desirable Character Trait 1], [Desirable Character Trait 2] and a [Desirable Character Trait 3].
[Unique Feature or Strategy] is a massive differentiator.

## Example

In the last few years, writing quality on Twitter has disintegrated.
You will thrive if you have an authentic style, consistent output, and a results-oriented approach.
Being authentically helpful can be your massive differentiator.
